taskFrame: Proofline design contract를 runnable Next.js app으로 구현하고, typecheck/lint/build/smoke baseline으로 검증한다.
successCriteria: workspace/app 에 runnable Next.js 16 app이 생성된다
solution fullFeatureSet의 핵심 flow가 최소 3개 이상의 route에서 동작한다
seeded demo path로 login -> review queue -> review room -> packet publish flow가 재현된다
required verification baseline(typecheck, lint, build, smoke)이 통과한다
constraints: component sprawl을 줄이고 shadcn primitives를 재사용한다
selectedMethod: TDD-first within scaffold-then-fill을 선택한다. 먼저 smoke path를 고정하는 failing Playwright test를 작성해 앱의 required flow를 명시하고, 이후 scaffold를 만들고 seeded data 기반 minimal implementation으로 test를 녹인다. UI polish는 verification baseline 이후에만 올린다.
branchPlan: 7개 순차 role-play branch를 사용한다. Branch 1 scaffold architecture, Branch 2 route/file plan, Branch 3 data model plan, Branch 4 auth/session plan, Branch 5 UI composition plan, Branch 6 testing/verification plan, Branch 7 risk-first simplification selector.
synthesisRule: branch 결과를 하나의 implementation strategy로 합치되, review room 중심 route structure와 local seeded data path를 우선 보존한다.
stopCondition: required verification baseline이 통과하고 build review 5회가 끝나면 종료한다.
pruningPolicy: runtime complexity, external services, unnecessary abstractions, non-essential routes는 우선 삭제한다.

componentPlan.appShell: single authenticated shell with left nav rail

riskAreas: missing local auth or DB could overcomplicate v1
review room UI may sprawl if component boundaries are unclear
Playwright setup can fail if dev/prod boot scripts are inconsistent
typed mapping logic can balloon if not constrained to seeded schemas

toolchain.nodeVersion: 25.8.2 installed locally; satisfies Next.js 16 requirement of Node 20.9+

implementationBiases: prefer server components for static seeded data shells
use client components only for interactive editing surfaces
